title: IVX AI Chat — Scroll to Last Conversation & Loading Removal
fixes: Aggressive scroll-to-end on conversation load with 6 retries (0, 80, 150, 300, 500, 800, 1200ms) so the thread always opens on the latest message.
Added FlatList onLayout scroll-to-end guard to handle the race where messagesQuery data arrives before the list measures.
Removed composer loading placeholder ('Sending message...', 'Uploading attachment...', 'Choosing attachment...').
Removed typing / progress banner above the composer (animated dots + 'Delivering your message…' / 'IVX IA is thinking…').
Live Work bar now always shows 'Live Work' instead of pulsing 'IVX is working…'.
Removed 'Sending' / 'Uploading' status labels from message bubbles; kept 'Sent', 'Seen', 'Delivered', 'Not sent'.
InvestorSupportChat no longer shows connecting/waiting/typing banners; opens directly on latest message.
iOS ChatTabView opens the AI room link directly without a welcome-banner delay and labels it 'Open room — latest first'.
remaining: Expo runChecks reports a structural false-positive ('backend/hono.ts missing') while the file exists at backend/hono.ts; this does not affect the chat fix.
